mapper.select: SELECT employee_id FROM duty_schedule_employee WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM duty_schedule_employee WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT e.id, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_code AS employeeCode, e.dept_id AS deptId, e.status, dse.is_leader AS isLeader FROM duty_schedule_employee dse LEFT JOIN sys_employee e ON dse.employee_id = e.id WHERE dse.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY dse.sort_order ASC
